MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Continued To Jul-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Of Motion To Bifurcate The Proceedings
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Advanced From Mar-14-16 To Feb-26-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Of Motion To Bifurcate The Proceedings
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Flatiron Capital's motion to bifurcate is denied without prejudice to making the same request to the trial judge. The trial judge is in the best position to decide this motion. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Legal Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOHN T. CU, ESQ. of Hanson Bridgett, Tel No. 415-777-3200 appearing for Flatiron Capital;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF JMA INVESTMENTS' Motion To Disqualify Legal Counsel is DENIED. Plaintiff JMA Investments moves to disqualify Flatiron Capital's counsel, asserting that Flatiron's counsel currently represents JMA's co-owner, Porter, in another matter. However, even treating JMA and Porter as one entity for argument's sake, Porter ended counsel's engagement in the other matter six months ago, stating: "I will not require any further assistance from you" and "cease all work"; counsel followed up with a disengagement letter. Thus, counsel did not unilaterally convert a present client into a former client as JMA asserts. Nor does JMA claim any relationship between the two matters. The motion is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ALAN L. MARTINI, ESQ. of Sheuerman, Martini & Tabari, Tel No. 408-288-9700 appearing for the Plaintiff JMA Investments;
Atty. JOHN T. CU, ESQ. of Hanson Bridgett LLP, Tel No. 415-777-3200 appearing for Defendant Flatiron Capital.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court takes under submission DEFENDANT FLATIRON CAPITAL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication as to issues 2, 3, and 4. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as to issues 1 and 5, denying the motion for summary judgment. Flatiron waived the lack of capacity defense/plea in abatement. Flatiron did not raise the plea in a timely fashion and lack of capacity is not pleaded as an affirmative defense. (Color-Vue, Inc. v. Abrams (1996) 44 Cal.App.4th 1599, 1604-1605). Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Feb-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ALAN L. MARTINI, ESQ. of Sheuerman, Martini & Tabari, Tel No. 408-288-9700 appearing for the Plaintiff JMA Investments;
Atty. JOHN T. CU, ESQ. of Hanson Bridgett LLP, Tel No. 415-777-3200 appearing for Defendant Flatiron Capital.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FLATIRON CAPITAL'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is denied. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges Flatiron's liaiblity in the action. As explained in the summary judgment ruling, GGGC's suspended status does not bar the action. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
